channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Government announces $10 billion plan to boost fuel and fertiliser security
item.description: The Australian government has announced a $10 billion plan aimed at strengthening the nation’s fuel and fertiliser security amid rising global tensions and supply concerns. Prime Minister Anthony Alba...

item.title: President Samia Urges New Leaders to Serve Citizens with Integrity and Humility
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has called on newly sworn-in leaders to remember that leadership is a trust, not a platform for self-glorification. During the ceremony at Chamwino State House, she remin...

item.title: Australia’s Path to Sustainable Heavy Industry: Challenges and Opportunities
item.description: Australia is well-endowed with minerals, metals, and renewable energy potential from sun and wind. Its mining and heavy industries, such as iron ore and copper extraction, contribute significantly to ...

item.title: Weather Conditions Begin to Clear Across Parts of South Africa
item.description: The South African Weather Service (SAWS) has indicated that adverse weather conditions will start clearing from central regions of the country from the afternoon of 6 May 2026. Gauteng, North West, an...

item.title: Madras High Court directs registry to list petition seeking probe into Vijay’s alleged income suppression
item.description: The Madras High Court has directed its registry to list a petition that seeks legal action against Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) chief and actor Vijay for alleged suppression of income and receipt of...

item.title: IPOB Announces 12-Hour Lockdown in South-East to Mark Biafra Remembrance Day
item.description: The Indigenous People of Biafra (IPOB) don announce say dem go enforce total lockdown across South-East region on May 30, 2026, to mark what dem call Biafran Heroes and Heroines Remembrance Day. Accor...

item.title: PGMN Founder Franco Mabanta Arrested Following Romualdez Extortion Complaint
item.description: Franco Mabanta, founder of Peanut Gallery Media Network (PGMN), has been arrested after former House Speaker Martin Romualdez filed an extortion complaint against him. The complaint alleges that Maban...

item.title: Whistle-Blower Faces Police Harassment After Reporting FCTA Official For Certificate Forgery
item.description: For Naija, the matter dey serious. Njokwu Ifeanyichukwu, one whistle-blower wey expose Anita Anurika Odom, a senior FCTA staff, for certificate forgery, dey face wahala from Nigeria Police Force. Inst...

item.title: Debate over media treatment of Zack Polanski highlights tensions around antisemitism and left-wing politics in the UK
item.description: This opinion piece by Owen Jones argues that Green Party leader Zack Polanski has been subjected to unfair and dismissive treatment in sections of the British media, particularly regarding his Jewish ...

item.title: Short Pre-Surgery Immunotherapy Shows Long-Term Success in Colorectal Cancer Patients
item.description: A UK-led clinical trial has demonstrated that a brief course of immunotherapy before surgery can produce remarkable outcomes for patients with stage two or three colorectal cancer. The NEOPRISM-CRC st...

item.title: PMD Forecasts Intense Heatwave Across Pakistan Between May 7 and 11
item.description: The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) has issued a warning for severe heatwave conditions across central and southern regions of Pakistan from May 7 to 11, 2026. The extreme temperatures are be...

item.title: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 to Feature Expert Panel on Early-Stage M&A Strategies
item.description: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026, scheduled for October 13–15 at San Francisco’s Moscone West, will feature a dedicated panel aimed at founders navigating mergers and acquisitions (M&A). The conference is offe...

item.title: US and Iran Near Agreement to Restore Strait of Hormuz and Ease Tensions
item.description: Recent developments suggest that the United States and Iran are approaching a potential agreement to end ongoing hostilities. Iran is currently reviewing a concise memorandum of understanding that cou...

item.title: Tim Hortons Reports Strong Q1 Sales Despite Challenging Conditions
item.description: Restaurant Brands International, which owns Tim Hortons, reported that its first-quarter sales remained robust despite challenging external factors. The company noted that colder-than-usual weather an...

item.title: 19-year-old ex-Army cadet jailed for stalking two young women and threatening violence
item.description: Dihan Rahman, a 19-year-old former Army cadet from West London, has been sentenced to four-and-a-half years in prison, with an additional three-year extended licence, following a sustained campaign of...

item.title: Five professional dancers depart Strictly Come Dancing ahead of 2026 series
item.description: The BBC has announced that five professional dancers will be leaving Strictly Come Dancing as preparations for the 2026 series begin. Karen Hauer, the show's longest-serving female professional, depar...

item.title: Narito ang mga official na winning number ng PCSO lotto para sa Mayo 6, 2026
item.description: Naglabas ngayon ng mga resulta ang Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) para sa mga lotto draw noong Mayo 6, 2026, kabilang ang mga sikat na laro tulad ng Grand Lotto 6/55, Mega Lotto 6/45, Su...

item.title: CRDB Foundation launches UDSM initiative to turn student research into businesses
item.description: CRDB Bank Foundation imezindua IMBEJU–UDSM Startup Challenge 2026 kwenye Chuo Kikuu cha Dar es Salaam (UDSM) ili kusaidia wanafunzi na wahitimu wa hivi karibuni kugeuza miradi ya kitaaluma, utafiti na...

item.title: Dar City Makes History as First Tanzanian Club in BAL Playoffs
item.description: Dar es Salaam's own Dar City Basketball Club is making history as they prepare to face Angola's Petro de Luanda in the quarter-finals of the Basketball Africa League (BAL) playoffs. The knockout stage...

item.title: Relief efforts reach families displaced by severe storm in Nelson Mandela Bay
item.description: A severe level 8 storm hit Nelson Mandela Bay, causing significant flooding and displacing many families in townships such as Kwazakhele and Dongweni. Relief efforts quickly mobilised, with the charit...
